data.title: Ant International Launches Open-Sourced Agentic Mobile Protocol to Drive AI Commerce
data.description: Ant International, based in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, has announced the launch of the Agentic Mobile Protocol (AMP). This innovative technology aims to facilitate secure agentic payment connections to mobile services. By leveraging AMP, users can experience seamless and safe transactions through their mobile devices. AMP is designed to enhance the efficiency and security of mobile payment processes, ensuring a smooth and reliable experience for users.

data.title: LTM Launches BlueVerse™ Studio as a Hub for Enterprise Agentic AI Adoption
data.description: In Bengaluru, India, LTM has introduced its BlueVerse Studio, a specialized center aimed at fast-tracking Enterprise Agentic AI implementation.

data.title: Microsoft and Postel: An Innovative New Data and AI-Driven Solution to Optimize Italian SMEs' Relationships with Their Customers
data.description: In Rome, Microsoft and Postel, a subsidiary of Poste Italiane Group, have revealed an enhanced collaboration to support the digital transformation of Italian businesses. They have brought in Audiencerate as a technology partner for Data and Direct & Digital Marketing. This partnership involves the distribution of an integrated platform merging Postel's omnichannel communication services with Audiencerate's data intelligence. The agreement signifies a significant step in advancing the capabilities for businesses in Italy and beyond.

data.title: Valstybės investicinis kapitalas UAB audited Annual information for the year 2025
data.description: Valstybės investicinis kapitalas UAB has released its Financial Statements for the year 2025, complying with the International Financial Reporting Standards adopted by the European Union. The report includes the Independent Auditor’s Report, the Management Report, and essential financial figures.

data.title: Steady Q1 performance
data.description: In the face of external challenges, Telenor maintained stable operational performance during the first quarter. The company remains dedicated to enhancing its position as a trusted digital infrastructure provider. They are focused on fortifying the business for sustained growth in the future.

data.title: Santhera Announces Positive AIFA Board Decision on Reimbursement of AGAMREE® (vamorolone) in Italy
data.description: A Swiss pharmaceutical company, Santhera Pharmaceuticals, publicly disclosed that the Board of Directors of the Italian Medicines Agency (AIFA) has granted approval for the reimbursement of AGAMREE® (vamorolone) for individuals diagnosed with Duchenne muscular dystrophy (DMD), specifically those aged 4 years and above. This marks a significant milestone for Santhera Pharmaceuticals, listed as SIX: SANN, and showcases the recognition of AGAMREE® as a viable treatment option for DMD patients within Italy. The approval highlights a positive step towards facilitating access to essential medical care for those affected by this rare genetic disorder.
